posts.caption:
"Strength isn’t just in the moments they see, it’s in standing firm in the values that quietly shape you.
It’s the tough decisions made in silence, the ones that put them first.
Its walking away from everything you know in faith of a better way.
It’s not waiting until they’re “old enough” to start putting responsibility over comfort.

Whether it’s to get a promotion, find a girlfriend, lead your family, it takes time to become the man to lead the life you desire.
It starts now with every decision you make.

If you wait until you have responsibilities, to start taking responsibility, you’re too late.

Define who you want to become, and start being him now."

"The Olympia will always be a reminder of what’s possible when you give everything you have to something you love.
It’s not just a show. It’s a lifetime of lessons, friendships, and moments that shape who you become.

Made for those who live by their standards.

Shirt available for pre-order for 4 more days. Link in bio."

In this heartfelt video, [Name] takes a moment to reflect on their decade-long journey in bodybuilding, sharing their thoughts on dedication, relationships, and the emotions that come with walking away from a lifelong passion.

"I never would’ve thought going into the Olympia that the highlight of my week would be watching Ramon get his flowers.
We’ve stood side by side on that stage for years pushing each other to be better, and seeing him drop to his knees as they called his name brought tears to my eyes.
Not from sadness, but from pure joy, knowing exactly what that moment feels like, and how much work it takes to earn it.
And he earned every ounce of it.
It gave me a sense of peace and gratitude for the chapter I lived and the closure I didn’t know I needed.
You’ll be a great champion Dino🦖"
In Florida the BBQ stays out all year 🤝

"Went from multiple tears in my shoulder to hitting PR’s on external shoulder rotations. I’d call that a win🤝
Proof that doing the boring stuff that feels pointless, is often exactly what you need to take things to the next level. 

PS @gymshark Black Friday sale is going live this Sunday (whole site up to 50% off)."
Get jacked and live with purpose.
A little remedial work because being a Jacklete isn’t just about being jacked and athletic, it’s also about not being injured.
